SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.api14c

Class Api14cSafeChartBuilder

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.api14c.Api14cSafeChartBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Api14cSafeChartBuilder extends Object implements Serializable
Walks a NeqSim ProcessSystem and emits an API RP 14C / ISO 10418 SAFE chart.

Each piece of equipment is classified into an Api14cEquipmentCategory from its Java class name (Separator, Compressor, Pump, HeatExchanger, ...). The required device set is then looked up from Api14cSafetyAnalysisTable and compared against the user-declared "present" device set. The result lists the SAFE-chart rows and the union of all missing devices.

Because NeqSim does not currently model individual instrument tags per equipment, the "present" device set is provided externally - either by the caller or, for a quick-look SAFE chart, defaulted to the standard set with buildAssumingComplete(ProcessSystem).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Api14cSafeChartBuilder

      public Api14cSafeChartBuilder()

  • Method Details

    • declarePresent

      public Api14cSafeChartBuilder declarePresent(String equipmentName, Set<Api14cDeviceType> present)
      Declares which devices are installed on a piece of equipment.
      Parameters:
      equipmentName - equipment tag/name
      present - installed devices
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public Api14cSafeChartBuilder build(ProcessSystem process)
      Builds the SAFE chart from the given ProcessSystem.

      Equipment whose Java class cannot be classified into an Api14cEquipmentCategory is skipped (with no finding).

      Parameters:
      process - the process system
      Returns:
      this builder (with items populated)

    • buildAssumingComplete

      public Api14cSafeChartBuilder buildAssumingComplete(ProcessSystem process)
      Convenience method that builds the chart assuming every required device is present (useful for "what should this facility have?" overviews).
      Parameters:
      process - the process system
      Returns:
      this builder

    • classify

      public static Api14cEquipmentCategory classify(ProcessEquipmentInterface unit)
      Classifies a NeqSim process unit into an API RP 14C equipment category.
      Parameters:
      unit - the equipment
      Returns:
      category or null if not classifiable

    • getItems

      public List<Api14cSafeChartItem> getItems()
      Returns:
      chart items in build order

    • getGaps

      public List<String> getGaps()
      Returns:
      union of missing devices flagged as a gap list across all equipment

    • isComplete

      public boolean isComplete()
      Returns:
      true when every chart row is complete

    • toMarkdown

      public String toMarkdown()
      Renders the SAFE chart as a markdown-style table for inclusion in a report.
      Returns:
      markdown table string

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Returns:
      SAFE chart as pretty JSON
